creator: mjl@luckie.org.nz
text:
Created attachment 172185
update spoofer to 1.0.3

Update to 1.0.3.  Main difference for FreeBSD is that the GUI / scheduler system can now be told to write to a specific directory, which I suggest be /var/db/spoofer.  Other changes at:

https://www.caida.org/projects/spoofer/downloads/changelog.txt
